info.name: ParkHere API
info.description: ParkHere - Collaborative parking spot discovery API

item.name: Google Auth
item.description: Authenticate with a Google ID token. Returns JWT + user info. Creates account if user does not exist.

item.name: Update Profile Picture
item.description: Upload a new profile picture. Accepts multipart/form-data with a single file part.

item.name: Parking Spots
item.description: Parking spot CRUD and search endpoints

body.raw:
{
	"name": "Street Parking Lapa",
	"type": "STREET",
	"latitude": -22.9068,
	"longitude": -43.1729,
	"priceMin": 5.0,
	"priceMax": 15.0,
	"requiresBooking": false,
	"notes": "Calm street near Lapa arches, gets busy on weekends",
	"schedules": [
		{"dayOfWeek": "MONDAY", "openTime": "08:00", "closeTime": "18:00"},
		{"dayOfWeek": "TUESDAY", "openTime": "08:00", "closeTime": "18:00"}
	]
}

query.description: Set to true to override nearby spot conflict check

item.name: Reports
item.description: Parking spot confirmation and report endpoints

item.name: Submit Report (JSON)
item.description: Submit a report for a parking spot with JSON body only (no images).

body.raw:
{
	"availabilityStatus": "AVAILABLE",
	"estimatedPrice": 10.0,
	"safetyRating": 4,
	"informalChargeReported": true,
	"informalChargeType": "FLANELINHA",
	"informalChargeAmount": 20.0,
	"informalChargeAggressiveness": 3,
	"informalChargeNote": "Flanelinha near the corner",
	"note": "Plenty of space",
	"userLatitude": -22.9070,
	"userLongitude": -43.1730
}

item.name: Submit Report (Multipart)
item.description: Submit a report with images. Send multipart/form-data with a 'report' JSON part and optional 'images' file parts (max 3, JPEG/PNG/WebP, 5MB each).

formdata.value:
{
	"availabilityStatus": "AVAILABLE",
	"estimatedPrice": 10.0,
	"safetyRating": 4,
	"informalChargeReported": true,
	"informalChargeType": "FLANELINHA",
	"informalChargeAmount": 20.0,
	"informalChargeAggressiveness": 3,
	"informalChargeNote": "Flanelinha near the corner",
	"note": "Plenty of space",
	"userLatitude": -22.9070,
	"userLongitude": -43.1730
}
